nika trace flow · the data waterfall
Which output fed which task.
run.ndjson × signature-demo.nika.yaml 11 edges
$ nika trace flow run.ndjson signature-demo.nika.yaml discover ─101B→ digest discover ─101B→ stats digest ─324B→ draft draft ─389B→ translate translate ─1.8KB→ survivors survivors ─1.8KB→ verify survivors ─1.8KB→ publish verify ─2.0KB→ publish publish ─32B→ report stats ─11B→ report report ─107B→ outputs.notes 11 edges · widest: verify→publish · derived from plan bindings × trace sizes
nika 0.93.1 · real cli output · mock model · offline · 100-col pty nika.sh 🦋
